titleStmt.title: SII 31.257: original edition by C. A. Padmanabha Sastri and T. S. Ravishankar
No. 257. (A.R. No. B 225 of 1938.) DONḌAPĀḌU (hamlet of Valasapalle), KAMALAPURAM TALUK, CUDDAPAH DISTRICT.

summary.p: Slab lying near the Gōpālasvāmi temple.
This record is dated in the cyclic year Pramōdūta, Śrāvana, śu. 7, Friday.

It registers remission of tax at the rate of 10 (dasavanda) for the land called mīnumānya situated in front of the tank in Doṇḍpāḍu by Vōbulayyadēva-Mahārāja, son of Maha Maharāja, to Singamareḍḍi Timmaya and Kaṁchchena Timmaya, for having built the tank. The village Doṇḍpāḍu is stated to be situated in Gaṇḍikōṭasīma and to have been given to the donor by Sāḷuva Gōvindayya. The dasavanda is equal to one ēndumu (measurement) of land.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
pramōdūta saṁvvatsara śrāvaṇa śuddha 7 śu śrīmanmahāmaṁḍalēśvara ma
larāju komāruṁḍu
vōbuḷayyadēva mahā
rājulu doṁḍḍapāṭi
siṁggamareḍḍi tiṁmaya
kaṁccana tiṁmayagārki
I dha¨rmmaśāsanaṁ . māku
nu sāḷuvagōviṁda
yagāru gaṁḍikōṭa sīma
lōnu pāliṁccina doṁḍḍapā
ṭīgrāmānu mīrukuṁṭṭaku
Digital edition of SII 31.257 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
